Tests if an anonymous function is correctly identified as a function type.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test to verify the type of an anonymous function in JavaScript. It uses the `assert` function to check if the type of an anonymous function, created using `function(){}`, is equal to the string `'function'`. This test ensures that the JavaScript environment correctly identifies and classifies anonymous functions as functions. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing solely on this specific type check.
